title: Fix GitHub Pages CI type environment
description: Added explicit @types/node dev dependency after the initial GitHub Pages workflow failed on node:fs/node:url type declarations in CI.
decision_notes: Local typecheck passed before because Node typings were available transitively, but GitHub Actions failed during npm ci prepare/build.
Adding @types/node makes the test files and Vite config node:* imports explicit and reproducible.
verification: gh run view 28325355761 --repo ai-org-labs/archmap --log-failed: missing node:fs/node:url type declarations
